---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem you're trying to solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to accomplish that's currently
hard or impossible?

## What's your proposed solution?

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other approaches that would also work, and why you didn't pick them.

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] Just suggesting; no time to contribute
